"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.ignoreElements = void 0; var lift_1 = require("../util/lift"); var OperatorSubscriber_1 = require("./OperatorSubscriber"); var noop_1 = require("../util/noop"); function ignoreElements() { return lift_1.operate(function (source, subscriber) { source.subscribe(OperatorSubscriber_1.createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, noop_1.noop)); }); } exports.ignoreElements = ignoreElements; //# sourceMappingURL=ignoreElements.js.map
